title: gaultheria buxifolia var. secunda
intro: Gaultheria buxifolia var. secunda is a variant of the Gaultheria buxifolia plant, a type of flowering plant in the heath family that is native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The leaves and stems of Gaultheria buxifolia var. secunda have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties. The plant is used for its health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing pain, and treating wounds. Gaultheria buxifolia var. secunda can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
